'''Heedron Bomu''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Infantry/Legends|soldier]]. He was a member of the [[Bomu Clan]], and a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]].

Heedron was the captain of the light [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Vengeance (YV-260 light freighter)|''Vengeance'']], whose crew included Heedron's brother [[Ormann Bomu|Ormann]]. Both of them had been working for a time for [[Zonnos Anjiliac Priare|Zonnos the Lesser]] of the [[Anjiliac]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]], raiding enemy [[Starship/Legends|ships]].

In typical Hutt fashion, there was much infighting in the Anjiliac kajidic. Heedron was dispatched by Zonnos to prevent the rescue of his brother [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera|Mika]] from [[Endregaad]]. The rescue was instigated by Zonnos' parent [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto|Popara]], and was more than the pair could handle. In the ensuing firefight, it is believed that Ormann was [[Death/Legends|killed]] and Heedron handed over to the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]].

The rescuers found two more Bomus on Endregaad when returning to their ships, wanting to "finish the job". It is unclear if they were Heedron and Ormann, or if they were their relatives, [[Gespo Bomu|Gespo]] and [[Hreeda Bomu]], looking for revenge.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]'' {{1st}}
